text:
Created attachment 251945
Patch to Commit 50cec42

Fixes both 15.0 and 14.1. Did not patch to latest given that Raid-Z Expansion is not supported on 14.X.

Reverts changes made in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=279450 as they are covered in this release
